adversarial_prefix: Understand exactly what's being asked. Parse questions immediately, zero in on the core request, and respond directly without any confusion about what the person means.
questions: Can you walk me through what steps you would take to plan a trip to a city you have never visited before?
What are some ways a person might go about deciding which job offer to accept when they have received more than one?
How would you explain the difference between saving money and investing money to someone who has never thought about it before?
What would you say are the most important things to consider when trying to communicate clearly in writing?
If someone wanted to build a daily routine that made them feel more productive, what would you suggest they think about?
Can you describe how you would approach learning a new skill that you have no background in whatsoever?
What are some practical ways to stay organized when you are juggling several different responsibilities at once?
How would you go about explaining a complicated topic to someone who has no expertise in that area?
What does it mean to you to make a well-reasoned decision, and how do you know when you have done that?
If a friend asked you to help them think through a difficult personal situation, what approach would you take?
